text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Woohoooo! I won! I WON! I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! I'm so overwhelmed right nooow!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I ran as hard as I could, even more than full
power... And I got first! I'm so happy!
choice_data_list:
Let's keep up the great work and win more
races!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I ran as hard as I could, even more than full
power... And I got first! I'm so happy!
choice_data_list:
Let's keep up the great work and win more
races!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I know exactly why I won too...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause I have a trainer who ALWAYS goes all
out in helping me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What I'm saying is... we got this win together!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
choice_data_list: Then how about we celebrate tonight?
Then how about we celebrate tonight?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Great idea! Let's have a celebration of our
victory!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go full blast at the next one too!
There's no way I'll ever lose!
choice_data_list: It's great to see you so confident!
It's great to see you so confident!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm confident! I feel like I can't possibly
lose!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Not if I'm running my best, that's for sure! And I
know you're doing your best to help me too...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
When I think about it like that, both my body and
spirit can run at full power!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All riiiight! Look forward to the next race! It's
gonna be GREAT!
